allowed_claims: FutureSemanticTraceState schema/head/export/eval chain exists as an engineering diagnostic.
External hard-case bridge is real and leakage-guarded.
Next work should train future semantic trace features directly.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim V7 predicted semantic state is externally load-bearing.
Do not present appearance-only candidate scoring as STWM success.
Do not continue post-hoc scorer tuning as the main method.
